message:
refactor(test): replace collected Vec lookups with iterator any() checks

Replace the pattern of collecting selected IDs into a Vec<&str> then
calling contains() with direct iterator .any() checks on plan.selected.
This eliminates the intermediate allocation and makes each assertion
self-contained — easier to read and produces better error messages
since the assertion text directly shows the predicate.

Applied across multiple test functions: voi_selects_candidates_within_budget,
voi_skips_stale_candidates, voi_skips_below_utility_floor, and others.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
